{{Quote|That the liner registered on anyone's long range sensors proves that the ship wasn't following procedure. Now that we've actually got data readings of it proves this.|Roonyard Noon|<ref name="Hnn" />}}
'''Roonyard Noon''' was a [[Sy Myrthian/Legends|Sy Myrthian]] [[Lawyer/Legends|lawyer]] whose [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] and three children were aboard the hijacked ''[[Elegant Wake]]''. Noon claimed, along with other relatives, that the standard silent running procedure for passing through the [[Merson asteroid belt]] was botched by crew incompetence, and that the [[Bureau of Ships and Services/Legends|BoSS]] data would back their claims.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|regional/1337_5.html|Merson Pirates Attack Sy Myrth Liner}} {{1st}}
